arts.ttl: Report: Why Bayern Munich is “not planning” to offer Eric Dier a new contract
arts.sum: What about some takes on the recent transfer news involving Bayern Munich being a “realistic” possibility for Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz to to join the Bavarians next season? Since arriving in the January transfer window of the 2023/24 season, Dier has not only offered defensive depth for the Bavarians — he has, at multiple times under both coaches Thomas Tuchel and Vincent Kompany, excellent in the XI.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich balking at Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen’s release clause
arts.sum: It’s no secret that Bayern Munich wants a taste of Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen, along with a lot of other European clubs. What about some takes on the recent transfer news involving Bayern Munich being a “realistic” possibility for Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz to to join the Bavarians next season?

arts.ttl: Kompany sidesteps talk about Bayern-linked Wirtz
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany gave up trying to answer a question about what makes Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz special, saying he wasn't "in the mood."

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller not scared of Bayer Leverkusen ahead of Champions League fixtures
arts.sum: Müller recently chimed in on drawing Bayer Leverkusen and the upcoming fixtures. Müller is certainly up to any challenge by this point of his career and Bayer Leverkusen is no exception.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen (Champions League)
arts.sum: The game is the spectacle, but there is a sideshow going on with Bayern Munich’s public courtship of Florian Wirtz — which should ramp up the hard feelings and intensity of this contest even more. Bayern Munich is set to host Bayer Leverkusen in a massively anticipated Champions League showdown.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch and more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen will square off for the fourth time in the third competition this campaign. Both Bundesliga matches ended in a draw and Leverkusen knocked out Bayern in the DFB-Pokal.

arts.ttl: Bayern coach 'not in the mood' for question about Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany gave up trying to answer a question about what makes Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz special. He said it was a boon for Germany, before saying his players will need be at their best to counter Leverkusen in Munich.

arts.ttl: Midweek Warm-up: Who would make your Bayern Munich All-Time Team?; Champions League predictions; Throwing it back to Metallica; and MORE!
arts.sum: Prediction: Bayern Munich 1-1 Bayer Leverkusen Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen are about as evenly matched as two teams could be this season.

arts.ttl: Kompany speaks ahead of Leverkusen clash
arts.sum: Speaking at today's press conference, Bayern München head coach Vincent Kompany outlined his thoughts ahead of Bayern's Champions League Round of 16 clash against Bayer Leverkusen.
